name: Forgotten floor
description:
"That's... New"

"It's... A very old place"

"And dusty!"

"Are we... Definitely must go deeper? What if there's lurking something much worse than twisteds?"

Old gardenview, a place of happiness and joy now is scary and dangerous place. Toons everyday went down there, filling weird machines with mysterious liquid named “ichor“. They all were forgotten, left to rot in this forgotten as well place. Everyday they seeing twisted versions of their friends, of themselves and uses to survive.

Pick your team. Today Dandy, You and your teammates will explore abandoned bottom of Gardenview, because the elevator just broke down in middle of run.

1.Sprout, Vee, Shelly, Tisha, Scraps, Good, Boxten, Poppy.

2.Gigi, Rodger, Teagan, Glisten, Finn, Cosmo, Brusha

YOU can play as 10th fellow toon, orrr... Take role of DM and describe their way and events what can happens in their small journey.

Have fun.

Tags:Dandy's world, dandys world, DW, Vee, Sprout, Shelly, Dandy, Poppy, Boxten, Goob, Scraps, Astro, run, elevator, sigma
creator: Sisinasisu
